prompt.description: Text prompt describing what to generate or edit. For editing, reference images by position (e.g., 'Image 1', 'Image 2').
prompt.title: Prompt

reference_images.description: Reference images for editing (1-3 images). Image 1 can be subject, Image 2 clothing/style, Image 3 pose, etc.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

width.description: Output width in pixels (512-2048). Total pixels must be between 512*512 and 2048*2048.
width.title: Width

height.description: Output height in pixels (512-2048). Total pixels must be between 512*512 and 2048*2048.
height.title: Height

negative_prompt.description: Content to avoid in the generated image (max 500 characters).
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt_extend.description: Enable prompt rewriting for more diverse content. Disable for precise control.
prompt_extend.title: Prompt Extend
